svg.title: LDLP Solution Architecture
svg.desc: Data platform architecture showing Customer, CRM, OpenData, Manual and Product metrics sources flowing through ADF into Raw, Landing, Cleaned, and Curated layers with MDM bridge, SCD2, and PowerBI serving.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Describe the customer file ingestion pipeline in detail')
sendPrompt('Describe the CRM Synapse views ingestion pipeline')
sendPrompt('Describe the Open Data API ingestion from Slovak Statistics')
sendPrompt('Describe how manual xlsx inputs are processed')
sendPrompt('How do Product metrics feed into dimension tables?')
sendPrompt('How does DLT format validation work in the Raw layer?')
sendPrompt('What is stored in the raw file metadata registry?')
sendPrompt('How does email notification via Microsoft Graph API work on validation failure?')
sendPrompt('How does MDM product mapping work using the bridge table?')
sendPrompt('How does MDM account mapping work?')
sendPrompt('How does competitor product MDM mapping work?')
sendPrompt('How is the Customer dimension created from ADLS folder structure?')
sendPrompt('What custom SQL rules are applied for MDM validation?')
g.text: custom SQL rule → detect unresolved keys

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How is the Bridge Excel file structured with 3 mapping sheets?')
sendPrompt('How does the business user fill the bridge mapping file and upload it?')
sendPrompt('How does FK resolution map ACCOUNT_KEY, PRODUCT_KEY and CUSTOMER_KEY in the cleaned layer?')
sendPrompt('How does SCD2 work for CRM data history tracking?')
sendPrompt('How is the SALES_FACTS table structured in the curated layer?')
sendPrompt('How is the Product dimension structured in curated layer?')
sendPrompt('How is the Account dimension structured from CRM SCD2?')
sendPrompt('How is the Customer dimension created?')
sendPrompt('How is the Competitor dimension manually curated?')
sendPrompt('How are manual fact tables like Warehouse Stock, Planning and Spending processed?')
sendPrompt('How does the Databricks SQL Warehouse serving layer work for PowerBI?')
sendPrompt('How is PowerBI connected to the Databricks serving layer via semantic model?')
